description_long: This is a vibrant, retro-style arcade game cabinet with a predominantly pink color scheme and playful, cartoonish artwork. The front features a large rectangular screen, a marquee labeled 'Chica's Feeding Frenzy' with colorful graphics, and a control panel with several buttons and a joystick. The lower front section includes a coin slot and access panel, typical of classic arcade machines. Both side panels are decorated with lively illustrations of a cartoon bird character enjoying fast food items like pizza, burgers, and drinks, set against a whimsical, pastel background. The back of the cabinet is plain black with ventilation grilles and access panels, while the top and control surfaces are smooth and glossy.
description: A pink arcade game cabinet with cartoon food-themed artwork, a large screen, and a colorful control panel. The sides feature playful illustrations of a bird character eating fast food.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, marquee, control panel with buttons, and coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full cartoon artwork of a bird character with food items on a pink background.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain black back panel with ventilation grilles and no artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view, mirroring the left, with the same cartoon artwork and food imagery.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (screen is flat, rectangular, and appears to have a bezel, but display technology is not visually identifiable)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and three colored buttons arranged in a row, plus a start button; control panel is pink with a cartoon decal.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'Chica's Feeding Frenzy' in colorful, playful font with cartoon food and character graphics, matching the overall fun and whimsical theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels are decorated with large, colorful cartoon artwork of a bird character eating fast food (pizza, burger, drink) on a pink and pastel background with playful patterns.
